---
title: "Episodes"
toc: false
title-block-banner: resources/banner.png
include-back-link: false
page-layout: full
listing:
    - id: python_they_wrote
      contents: "episodes/ep_*/index.qmd"
      sort: "name"
      type: grid
      grid-columns: 2
      categories: false
      template: episodes/listing-wide.ejs
    - id: chordcast
      contents: "episodes/chordcast_*/index.qmd"
      sort: "name"
      type: grid
      grid-columns: 2
      categories: false
      template: episodes/listing-wide.ejs
---

::: {.fade-in .delay-1}

:::{#python_they_wrote}
:::

:::

::: {.fade-in .delay-3}

## A Blast from the Past: CHORDCast

Did you know there was an HSMA podcast many years ago?

Have a listen to the episodes here!

:::{#chordcast}
:::

:::
